description_long: This is a rectangular, pink vending machine with a prominent cream-colored sign at the top displaying the word 'CANDY' in block letters. The front features four shelves filled with colorful candy bars, each separated by dividers, and a horizontal retrieval slot at the bottom. On the right side, there is a protruding digital display panel mounted on a curved arm, and a purple cable runs from the back to the side, suggesting power or connectivity. The back of the machine has four large, round, gray pads or feet and a vented panel, while the left side is mostly plain except for the cable. The overall design is playful and stylized, with smooth, rounded edges and a matte finish.
description: A pink, rectangular vending machine labeled 'CANDY' with colorful candy bars, a digital display panel, and a retrieval slot at the bottom.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'CANDY' sign, candy shelves, retrieval slot, and part of the digital display panel on the right.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the protruding digital display panel and the curved cable attachment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying four large gray pads or feet, a vented panel, and the purple cable looping out.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the vented panel, cable attachment, and a mostly plain pink surface.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular digital display panel is mounted on the right side of the machine, attached by a curved arm. It is medium-sized, flat, and appears to be a touchscreen.
attribute_payment_interface: A small rectangular payment interface is visible on the lower left front, likely for card or contactless payments, but no coin or bill slots are clearly visible.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Individual rectangular buttons are arranged in rows in front of each candy slot, each corresponding to a specific product.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A horizontal rectangular slot is located at the bottom center of the front face, likely with a flap for retrieving purchased items.
attribute_branding_or_signage: A large cream-colored sign at the top front displays the word 'CANDY' in block letters.
